entries.summary: Error Handling Enhancement - Completed all error handling improvements including progress reporting with percentage
top_rejection_reasons: No rejections - all tasks completed successfully
lessons_learned: Percentage-based progress reporting improves user experience during batch processing
Memory checking before each batch prevents system crashes
Batch size validation ensures robust processing even with invalid configuration
Comprehensive error handling tests catch edge cases early
Mock-based testing allows verification of logging behavior without actual LLM calls
